betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Long Range Viaducts§f

§aExtend viaduct range and speed for long-distance player transport across your base!§f

§bLong Range Viaducts§f increase player travel speed beyond the standard §e10 blocks/second§f. §bLong Range Linking Viaducts§f extend the maximum connection distance between viaduct segments.

§6Recipes (Fluid Transposer)§f:
§b• Long Range Viaduct§f — §e1× Viaduct§f + §e500 mB Zephyrean Aerotheum§f (§e4,000 RF§f).
§b• Long Range Linking Viaduct§f — §e1× Viaduct§f + §e1,000 mB Resonant Ender§f (§e8,000 RF§f).

§6Roles§f:
§b• Long Range Viaduct§f — Speeds up the player while in transit.
§b• Long Range Linking Viaduct§f — Bridges two viaduct segments that exceed the standard connection range.

§eTip§f: Use Long Range Linking Viaducts at the endpoints of long viaduct runs to bridge gaps between base sections, and Long Range Viaducts in between to keep travel snappy.
